arts.ttl: ‘It would be a great final’ - Cubarsi on potential UCL Clasico
arts.sum: We expect an Atlético that will come out all guns blazing, that will run the entire game, as is their style. The two La Liga giants are on opposite sides of the draw and so can only meet in the final, and Pau Cubarsi shared his thoughts on the prospect of facing Los Blancos in May.

The last international break of the season is upon us and as usual a number of Barça players will be off playing for their national teams. Exodus of 15 Barça players during this international break - Mundo Deportivo

arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea 'suffer major blow in pursuit' of Barcelona star who has excelled this season
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado, who has been linked with Manchester United and Chelsea, confirms his desire to spend his entire career with the Catalan giants.
